ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "alloc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the allocation associated with the transaction */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the transaction */,
  "gift" REAL /* Gift amount associated with the transaction */,
  "pub_flag" INTEGER /* Publication flag (e.g., 2 for public, 1 for private) */,
  "qre_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "qre_date_type" TEXT /* Type of date (e.g., D for discrete) */,
  "ucc" INTEGER /* Uniform Commercial Code (UCC) for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_alloc_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloc_id") REFERENCES allocations ("alloc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_ucc FOREIGN KEY ("ucc") REFERENCES ucc_codes ("ucc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocations" (
  "alloc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "alloc_name" TEXT /* Name of the allocation */,
  "alloc_description" TEXT /* Description of the allocation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the allocation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget after transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alloc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction type was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction type is active (1) or inactive (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ucc_codes" (
  "ucc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UCC */,
  "ucc_code" INTEGER /* UCC code */,
  "ucc_description" TEXT /* Description of the UCC */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the UCC code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the UCC code was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the UCC code is active (1) or inactive (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ucc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ucc_codes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "alloc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the allocation */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction at the time of the history entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_alloc_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloc_id") REFERENCES allocations ("alloc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_transactions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction for the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "alloc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the allocation */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_alloc_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloc_id") REFERENCES allocations ("alloc_id")
)
